title: Trade Journaler Role Work
summary: Reusable wrkstrm-finance workstream template for execution capture, journal sync, reconciliation, and audit-pack work.
instructions: Use this template when instantiating concrete Trade Journaler work.
Keep journal rows linked to execution imports, broker statements, or generated receipts.
Do not treat this reusable template as evidence that journal work was completed.
outcomes: Trade and position journals are entity-aware and idempotent.
Audit packs and reconciliation flows cite durable source evidence.

tasks.text: Capture fills and write Notion Position/Strategy entries with entity segregation.
Integrate sleeve capacity metrics; attach preflight checks and artifacts.
Automate IRS-ready audit packs with summaries and diffs.
Notion API integration and idempotent updates.
Notion export pipeline and archival structure.
Notion schema alignment; execution ingest and de-duplication.
Entity-aware journal writes with audit snapshots.
Reconciliation against broker statements; discrepancy workflows.
End-to-end audit packs and payroll cadence alignment.
